Implement a module named comparator_2bit with the following interface.

 - input  a   (2 bits)
 - input  b   (2 bits)
 - output eq  (1 bit)
 - output lt  (1 bit)
 - output gt  (1 bit)

The module should compare two unsigned 2-bit numbers a and b:
  eq = 1 when a equals b
  lt = 1 when a is strictly less than b
  gt = 1 when a is strictly greater than b
Exactly one of eq, lt, gt is 1 for any input combination.
